message:
fix: sanitize prefix hyphens to underscores for SQL database name (bd-qy0)

Init was using the raw prefix (with hyphens) as the SQL database name but
writing the underscore-sanitized version to metadata.json DoltDatabase field.
This caused openExistingTestDB to connect to a different (empty) database when
reading config back via metadata.json, resulting in empty issue_prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/topaz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
